title: Slide 7: 3D SPHERES
prompt: Presentation slide 7: "3D SPHERES". A chart of 3 percentage values (80%, 50%, 60%). Geometric, axis-aligned. In 3D, lift to a clean bar/column chart on a stage with the title floating above — corporate keynote aesthetic, not naturalistic.

source.prompt: Presentation slide 7: "3D SPHERES". A chart of 3 percentage values (80%, 50%, 60%). Geometric, axis-aligned. In 3D, lift to a clean bar/column chart on a stage with the title floating above — corporate keynote aesthetic, not naturalistic.
source.from2dCode: 3 bars + labels + stage + title. Pattern: percent-list. Hint: favor regular geometric shapes, stage/pedestal below data, camera tilted slightly above.
